name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: --do not use spread or tub products
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the cereals and pretzels in a large bowl and set aside.
3. Heat the peanut butter and margarine in a 1-quart saucepan over medium heat until boiling, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour the heated peanut butter mixture over the cereal mixture in the bowl, stirring to coat evenly.
5. Spread the combined mixture into an ungreased rectangular pan (13x9x2 inches).
6. Bake for 5 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, microwave the grape jelly in a small microwavable bowl uncovered on High for about 30 seconds or until melted.
8. Drizzle the melted jelly over the cereal mixture.
9. Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Stir in the raisins.
11. Spread the mix onto waxed paper to cool completely.
12. Store in an airtight container.
Note: For high altitudes (3500-6500 ft), increase the baking times to 6 minutes.
